headline: Dover (NYSE:DOV) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q2 CY2026 Earnings, Stock Drops
summary: Manufacturing company Dover (NYSE:DOV) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, but sales rose 6.9% year on year to $2.19 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.74 per share was 0.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
